companies.name: GIATEC GmbH
companies.shortDescription:
GIATEC GmbH. # GIATEC GmbH

GIATEC GmbH. GIATEC is a company that specializes in industrial automation systems. They have been in the automation industry for over 30 years and offer a wide range of automation solutions, from plant programming and visualization to new concept of manufacturing systems. They provide services from planning to operation, and have expertise in the development of mes, batch, and recipe systems. They work in various industries such as food, meat, beverages, steel. GIATEC GmbH employs 3 people (-20.0% YoY, -1 person). Headquartered in Hattingen, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.

## About
Giatec has been active in the automation industry for over 30 years and covers a wide range of requirement profiles. From plant wide PLC programming and visualisation to the conception of new production lines.

Another focus is on the development of MES and SCADA systems, which we have been using successfully at our customers for many years.

companies.name: MESALOGIC GmbH
companies.shortDescription:
MESALOGIC GmbH. MESALOGIC GmbH is a Software Development company. MESALOGIC GmbH is an IT/OT systemhaus that provides products and services for the digital future of industries, buildings, and infrastructure. They focus on data-driven and future-focused solutions, with a strong emphasis on collaboration and personalized solutions tailored to the needs of their partners. MESALOGIC GmbH employs 10 people (+44.4% YoY, +4 people), founded in 2014. Headquartered in Merenberg, Germany.
[...]
Als Softwarehaus steht die MESALOGIC GmbH Ihren Kunden im Bereich der SCADA und Fernalarmierung in allen Belangen beratend zur Seite. Dies ermöglichen wir durch unser hochqualifiziertes Team aus den Bereichen der Automatisierungs-, Informations- und Elektrotechnik. 

Das große Know-How und die langjährige Erfahrung unserer Mitarbeiter helfen uns dabei die Synergien zwischen MSR und IT optimal für Sie auszuschöpfen. Wir sehen es somit als unsere Aufgabe die neuartigen Technologien für Sie zu erkennen und diese in gegebene IT-Infrastrukturen so einzusetzen, dass Sie und Ihre Anlage davon profitieren.
[...]

companies.name: FASTEC GmbH
companies.shortDescription:
FASTEC GmbH. FASTEC GmbH is a Information Technology & Services company. FASTEC GmbH is a company that provides innovative MES solutions for the digital manufacturing. They offer a modular software for optimizing production and OEE. FASTEC GmbH employs 24 people (+2.2% YoY, +1 person), founded in 1995. Headquartered in Other.
[...]
FASTEC GmbH, based in Paderborn, employs more than 90 people. The leading provider of IT solutions for production companies has been supporting its customers on the path to digital transformation since 1995. The company sees itself as a solution partner for the factories of the future. The modular Manufacturing Execution System (MES) FASTEC 4 PRO is used by around 400 companies worldwide. Its well-known customers include food producers, pharmaceutical companies, automotive suppliers and toy manufacturers. The holistic digitalisation of production enables them to optimise their workflows and reduce their costs in the long term. The system offers functions for machine and production data acquisition, production planning, maintenance, quality assurance and traceability.
[...]

Autark GmbH. # Autark GmbH

Autark GmbH is a IT System Custom Software Development company. AUTARK is a company that provides connectivity solutions, computer control technology, process visualization, data acquisition, and high-speed measurement technology. They offer complete solutions for control execution and ensure transparency throughout the production process. With their mes-system, they provide complete solutions for control execution and ensure transparency throughout the entire production process. Autark GmbH employs 5 people, founded in 1990. Headquartered in Baunatal, Hesse, Germany.

## About
Autark is your partner in the field of networking solutions, host computer technology, process visualization, data acquisition and high-speed measurement technology since 1990. With our MES system, we offer a complete solution for your control task and ensure transparency throughout the entire production process.

companies.name: Hummingbird
companies.shortDescription:
Hummingbird-MES. # Hummingbird Systems GmbH

Hummingbird Systems GmbH is a Automation Machinery Manufacturing company. Hummingbird Systems develops a agile MES solution to better plan, control, automate and optimize processes across manufacturing operations – to increase your productivity. Hummingbird Systems GmbH employs 6 people (+50.0% YoY, +2 people), founded in 2015. Headquartered in Germany.

## About
The Hummingbird System is the 2nd generation process automation system for high precession single part production (like mold and die manufacturing). It is the number one industry 4.0 automation framework that covers all the technical processes: planning, controlling, CAD, CAM and shop floor automation.
The Hummingbird System is completely platform independent and offers an open 3rd party connectivity API that can be used to interact with any kind of system (ERP, CAD, CAM, automation cell).
